leadText: The X Speed (Japanese: スピーダー Speeder) is a type of battle item introduced in Generation I. It temporarily boosts a Pokémon's Speed stat.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations I to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Speed of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. From Generation II onward, it also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Speed of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Temporarily increases Speed for one battle. G S C Raises Speed . (1 BTL) R S E Colo XD Raises the stat Speed during one battle. FR LG Raises the Speed stat of Pok é mon in battle. Wears off if the Pok é mon is withdrawn. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item that raises the Speed stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn. X Y OR AS An item that boosts the Speed stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item that sharply boosts the Speed stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V An item that sharply boosts the Speed stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Masters X Speed: Raises the user's Speed by two stat ranks. X Speed +: Raises the user's Speed by three stat ranks. EX Speed: Raises the user's Speed by six stat ranks. X Speed All: Raises the Speed of all allied sync pairs by two stat ranks. X Speed All +: Raises the Speed of all allied sync pairs by three stat ranks.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generations I to VI 1.2.2 Generation VII onward 1.3 Wonder Launcher 1.4 Description 1.5 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R G B Y / R B Y G S C R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS P E BD SP $ 350 $ 175 S M US UM Sw Sh $ 1,000 $ 500 S V $ 1,000 $ 250 At Join Avenue 's Market, X Speed can be bought in dozens at $ 3150 each, which equates to $ 262.5 per X Speed. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations I to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Speed of a Pokémon currently in battle by 1 level. From Generation II onward, it also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Speed of a Pokémon currently in battle by 2 levels. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The X Speed appears as four Wonder Launcher items, increasing the Speed stat by 1, 2, 3 or 6 levels. It costs 3, 5, 7, or 11 points to use respectively. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Temporarily increases Speed for one battle. G S C Raises Speed . It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item that sharply boosts the Speed stat of a Pokémon during a battle. It wears off once the Pokémon is withdrawn. S V An item that sharply boosts the Speed stat of a Pokémon in battle. This effect disappears if the Pokémon leaves the battle.
